title: Quantum computer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''quantum computer''' was a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] capable of generating a random number that was forty-seven digits long for use as a password. For further protection from [[Slicer/Legends|slicing]], one digit in the number would shift one value lower or higher every six standard hours. It was used to create a number that protected a personal folder of [[Atour Riten]] that contained the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]], which was also protected by a series of [[pyrowall]]s and military wards.<ref name="DS">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
